title: Blinking Totem
description: Add a bit of life to your game by making totems of undying blink and look around.
body:
# Blinking Totem
A simple resource pack that makes the totem of undying a bit more alive.

It has new animations that make it blink, look around,  and even flash its red eyes!  Makes holding a totem just that bit more exciting, but all without making it overly distracting.

There are no requirements for this pack to run, it works with vanilla Minecraft!
___
![Totem blinking](https://i.imgur.com/SoL4O87.gif)
___
